text:
They're both great, but I have to say that I prefer this version to Taylor Davis. Lara seems to be actually playing for more of the piece than Taylor does, and her backup track is turned up loud enough for the viewer to hear without straining, whereas Taylor's is comparatively quite quiet, and obviously more for her cues than our accompaniment.

They are both far more talented than I, but in the MGS2 Theme Song Violin Shootout, Lara wins hands down in my book.
